events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1021. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Mexican; dislikes beef, mushrooms. Cooking ability: stovetop. 5 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Calabacitas con Pollo
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 43 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Veggie Enchiladas
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Turkey Picadillo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 440/700 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Fajita Bowl
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 450/700 mg ✓, carbs 57 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Tinga with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 454/700 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1021 added to route R-EXCE-1 (Excelsior), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1021: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
